arabic: تُفْصِحُ الْأَنْثْرُوبُولُوجِيَا الثَّقَافِيَّةُ الْمُعَاصِرَةُ عَنِ انْهِيَارِ تَمَيُّزِ مَفْهُومِ الثَّقَافَةِ الصَّافِيَةِ لِصَالِحِ رُؤْيَةٍ هَجِينَةٍ تُؤَكِّدُ السُّيُولَةَ وَالتَّشَابُكَ الدَّائِمَيْنِ.
translation: Savremena kulturna antropologija razotkriva raspad koncepta čiste kulture u korist hibridne vizije koja naglašava neprestanu fluidnost i isprepletenost.
translationEn: Contemporary cultural anthropology reveals the collapse of the concept of pure culture in favour of a hybrid vision that affirms permanent fluidity and entanglement.
